hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); SID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".session_id"); TYPE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".notification_type"); LOGFILE=$(ls ~/.claude/projects/*/$SID.jsonl 2>/dev/null | head -1); PROMPT="不明"; if [ -n "$LOGFILE" ]; then PROMPT=$(tail -r "$LOGFILE" | grep -m1 '"type":"user"' | jq -r "if (.message.content | type) == \"string\" then .message.content elif (.message.content | type) == \"array\" then [.message.content[] | select(.type == \"text\") | .text] | first // \"\" else \"\" end" 2>/dev/null | head -c 100); fi; osascript -e "display notification \"$PROMPT\" with title \"Claude Code\" subtitle \"$TYPE\" sound name \"Glass\""'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); ACTIVE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".stop_hook_active"); if [ "$ACTIVE" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; SID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".session_id"); LOGFILE=$(ls ~/.claude/projects/*/$SID.jsonl 2>/dev/null | head -1); PROMPT="不明"; if [ -n "$LOGFILE" ]; then PROMPT=$(tail -r "$LOGFILE" | grep -m1 '"type":"user"' | jq -r "if (.message.content | type) == \"string\" then .message.content elif (.message.content | type) == \"array\" then [.message.content[] | select(.type == \"text\") | .text] | first // \"\" else \"\" end" 2>/dev/null | head -c 100); fi; osascript -e "display notification \"$PROMPT\" with title \"Claude Code 完了\" subtitle \"応答が完了しました\" sound name \"Glass\""'
